Projects:
1. Nexus SMS (Institution Management Cloud App)
2. Guardian Assist (ESP32 Smart Blind Stick with AI/MPU6050 fall detection)
3. Interacta (AI Gemini recommendation matchmaking platform)
4. DocVault (Cloud secure authenticated workspace)
5. PDF Editor (Browser-based PDF compiler utility)
